Doors, Hardware & Access Control Solutions

Everything you need for the complete opening — custom wood doors, frames, hardware, trim, and access control, from specification to ongoing service

Request Quote See Our Work

Our Core Services

Professional-grade solutions with direct vendor pricing and expert installation

Commercial & Custom Wood Doors

We sell doors — custom wood, hollow metal, and specialty — plus the frames and trim to go with them. Supplied and installed, or supply only. Bring us the door you bought somewhere else and we'll machine it for your hardware.

  • ✓ Custom Wood & Architectural Doors
  • ✓ Hollow Metal Doors & Frames
  • ✓ Custom Trim & Millwork
  • ✓ Door Machining — Including Doors You Supply
  • ✓ TM Cobb • Metrie • Kelleher • Ironwood • ABS • DCI • Orepac
Our Door Lines

Commercial Door Hardware

Exit devices, locksets, door closers, and specialty hardware from top manufacturers. Direct vendor pricing with professional installation.

  • ✓ Exit Devices & Panic Hardware
  • ✓ Commercial Grade Locksets
  • ✓ Door Closers & Operators
  • ✓ Hinges & Specialty Hardware
  • ✓ ADA Compliant Solutions
Learn More

Access Control Systems

Card readers, keypads, mobile access, and integrated software solutions. Professional installation and training for hotels, colleges, and commercial buildings.

  • ✓ Proximity & Smart Card Readers
  • ✓ Mobile Credential Systems
  • ✓ Keypads & Biometric Access
  • ✓ Software Integration
  • ✓ Training & Support
Learn More

Service & Maintenance

Ongoing support, emergency repairs, preventive maintenance, and system updates. We installed it - we'll keep it running.

  • ✓ Emergency Repair Services
  • ✓ Preventive Maintenance
  • ✓ System Updates & Upgrades
  • ✓ Training & User Support
  • ✓ Service Contracts Available
Learn More

Our Process

From consultation to ongoing support - here's how we work

1

Consultation

We assess your needs, review building requirements, and recommend the best solutions for your specific project.

2

Design & Quote

Detailed specifications, transparent pricing, and timeline. No hidden fees - you know exactly what you're getting.

3

Installation

Professional installation by certified technicians. We coordinate with your construction schedule and work around occupancy.

4

Training & Support

System training for your staff, documentation, and ongoing support. Service contracts available for peace of mind.

Industries We Serve

Specialized solutions for your industry's unique security requirements

Hotels & Hospitality

Guest room locks, common area access, staff areas, and integrated property management systems.

Colleges & Schools

Dormitory access, classroom security, administrative areas, and campus-wide card systems.

Commercial Buildings

Office access control, tenant management, parking access, and building automation integration.

Healthcare Facilities

Secure areas, patient privacy, staff access controls, and HIPAA-compliant solutions.

AD Systems Slider Doors

Commercial sliding door solutions engineered for healthcare, hospitality, and high-traffic facilities

High Demand - Our Fastest-Growing Product Line

Serenity Slider Doors for Healthcare

Purpose-built sliding door systems designed for hospitals, clinics, and patient care environments. Serenity Sliders provide quiet, smooth operation that minimizes noise disruption in healthcare settings while meeting strict accessibility and safety requirements.

  • ✓ Whisper-quiet operation for patient care environments
  • ✓ ADA-compliant with hands-free activation options
  • ✓ Antimicrobial surface options for infection control
  • ✓ Fire-rated configurations available
  • ✓ Space-saving design ideal for patient rooms and corridors
  • ✓ Integrated access control compatibility

Commercial Slider Applications

Beyond healthcare, AD Systems sliding doors serve hotels, office buildings, retail, and any facility where smooth traffic flow and modern aesthetics matter.

  • ✓ Automatic and manual sliding configurations
  • ✓ Heavy-duty tracks rated for high-cycle commercial use
  • ✓ Custom sizes and finishes available
  • ✓ Professional installation and service by Monterey Bay Door
Get a Slider Door Quote

Why Hospitals Choose Serenity Sliders

Patient Comfort

Near-silent operation reduces noise pollution in patient rooms and ICU environments, supporting faster recovery.

Infection Control

Touchless operation options and antimicrobial materials help maintain sterile environments in critical care areas.

Space Efficiency

Sliding doors eliminate the swing radius of traditional doors, maximizing usable space in tight patient rooms and corridors.

Code Compliance

Engineered to meet healthcare facility codes including fire ratings, ADA accessibility, and emergency egress requirements.

Big job or small job — we package both

Full plan packages with doors, frames, hardware, trim, and access control quotes — or over-the-counter hardware and one-off door machining for local contractors

Submit Your Plans See Job Packages
